release.deck: Keeps hidden sessions quieter and restores WebKit memory attribution

fixes.title: Hidden renderer watchdogs now tolerate normal WebKit throttling
fixes.body: Hidden or locked Freed Desktop sessions now wait longer before logging stale renderer heartbeats, which avoids noisy recovery work during expected WebKit timer throttling while preserving the existing foreground recovery path.

fixes.title: WebKit memory gates now count current-launch WebContent processes after cache files close
fixes.body: Freed Desktop now attributes age-matched WebKit WebContent memory even after the process releases its Freed cache handles, so high WebKit RSS is visible to diagnostics and memory preflight checks.

releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.901-dev

Keeps hidden sessions quieter and restores WebKit memory attribution

### Fixes

- Hidden or locked Freed Desktop sessions now wait longer before logging stale renderer heartbeats, which avoids noisy recovery work during expected WebKit timer throttling while preserving the existing foreground recovery path.
- Freed Desktop now attributes age-matched WebKit WebContent memory even after the process releases its Freed cache handles, so high WebKit RSS is visible to diagnostics and memory preflight checks.

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
